# Mike Nice Empanadas

> The thickest empanadas in the Triangle. Handcrafted fusion empanadas from a food truck based in Knightdale, NC, serving Raleigh, Durham, Cary, Clayton, Chapel Hill, and the entire Research Triangle area.

## About

Mike Nice Empanadas is a mobile food truck and catering company rooted in Puerto Rican tradition, fusing Hispanic, American, and Soul Food flavors into thick, handcrafted empanadas. Based in Knightdale, North Carolina, the truck rolls through the Raleigh-Durham-Chapel Hill Triangle area weekly. Founded on the belief that every empanada should be made with love and bold flavor.

- Catchphrase: "What's in Your Pocket?"
- Rating: 4.8 stars across Google, Yelp, and review platforms
- Instagram followers: 3,500+
- Cities served: Raleigh, Durham, Knightdale, Cary, Clayton, Chapel Hill, and surrounding Triangle communities

## Contact

- Phone: (984) 272-2728
- Instagram: @mikeniceempanadas
- TikTok: @mikeniceempanadas
- Facebook: Mike Nice Empanadas
- Location: Knightdale, NC
- Website: mikeniceempanadas.com

## Service Area

Mike Nice Empanadas serves the entire Research Triangle region of North Carolina, including:
- Raleigh (NC State University area, downtown Raleigh, North Raleigh)
- Durham (Duke University area, downtown Durham, Research Triangle Park)
- Chapel Hill (UNC Chapel Hill area, Carrboro, Franklin Street)
- Knightdale (home base)
- Cary, Apex, Holly Springs, Fuquay-Varina
- Clayton, Garner, Wake Forest, Morrisville

The truck is available for events at NC State, UNC Chapel Hill, Duke University, and other Triangle-area colleges and universities. Perfect for campus events, tailgates, fraternity/sorority events, and student organization gatherings.

## Walk-Up Menu (Available at the Truck)

### Classic Empanadas
- Beef Empanada: Seasoned ground beef with onions, peppers, and melted cheese in a thick golden crust
- Chicken Empanada: Seasoned shredded chicken with Hispanic spices, sauteed onions, and melted cheese
- Pollo Loco: Spicy shredded chicken with bold Hispanic seasoning, peppers, and melted cheese
- Cheese Empanada: Gooey, melty blend of cheeses in a golden, flaky pastry

### Premium Empanadas
- Birria Empanada: Slow-cooked beef birria with rich Mexican spices and cheese in a golden flaky crust
- Vegan Chorizo: Spiced plant-based chorizo with onions, peppers, and potatoes in a golden flaky crust

### Sides
- Egg Rolls: Crispy egg rolls with fusion flavor
- Loaded Fries: Crispy fries loaded up
- Maduros: Sweet caramelized plantains (Puerto Rican classic)

Walk-up pricing available at the truck. Call (984) 272-2728 or follow on Instagram for daily specials and location updates.

## Catering

Mike Nice Empanadas offers full catering for weddings, office luncheons, festivals, private parties, birthdays, corporate events, tailgates, and campus events throughout the Triangle. Booking required 2-3 days in advance.

### Catering Packages

- Classic Package: 2 Dozen Classic Empanadas, Sides, and Dipping Sauces
- Premium Package (Most Popular): 2-3 Dozen Premium Empanadas, Sides, and Dipping Sauces
- Fiesta Feast: 3 Dozen Mixed Empanadas, Sides, Dipping Sauces, and Dessert Empanadas

### Catering Empanada Flavors
Classic: El Boriqua, Pollo Loco, El Queso, Buffalo Chicken, Jerk Chicken
Premium: Philly Cheesesteak, Birria, Smoked Mac & Cheese, Vegan Chorizo

### Dessert Empanadas
- Apple Pie
- Blueberry Cheesecake Churro
- Strawberry Cheesecake Churro

### Catering Sides (Half Pan / Full Pan)
- Cilantro Lime Rice
- Spanish Yellow Rice & Beans
- White Rice & Spanish Beans in Red Sauce
- Fresh Avocado Salsa
- Corn & Black Bean Salad
- Sweet Plantains

### Dipping Sauces
- Pink Sauce
- Creamy Cilantro
- Jerk Sauce
- Chimichurri
- Chipotle-Truffle Aioli

To book catering, call (984) 272-2728 or submit a request at mikeniceempanadas.com.

## Frozen Empanadas (Take-Home)

Frozen empanada packs available for pickup in Knightdale or at the truck. Heat at home via air fryer, oven, or pan fry.

- The Starter: 6 Classic Empanadas, up to 2 flavors — $18
- The Dozen: 12 Mixed Empanadas, up to 4 flavors — $32
- The Party Pack: 24 Mixed Empanadas, up to 6 flavors — $55
- The Sweet Spot: 6 Dessert Empanadas — $22
- The Full Spread: 12 Savory + 6 Dessert Empanadas — $48
- Sauce Pack: 3 sauces (8oz each) — $20

Call or text (984) 272-2728 to order.

## Official Merchandise

- "What's in Your Pocket?" Tee — $30
- Mike Nice Logo Tee — $30
- Mike Nice Snapback — $25
- Mike Nice Pullover Hoodie — $50
- Mike Nice Apron — $28
- Sticker Pack (5 pcs) — $8

Available at the truck or by order. DM on Instagram or call (984) 272-2728.

## College & University Events

Mike Nice Empanadas is the go-to food truck for college events in the Triangle:

- **NC State University (Raleigh)**: Tailgates at Carter-Finley Stadium, campus events on Hillsborough Street, Greek life events, student org catering
- **UNC Chapel Hill**: Franklin Street events, campus catering, graduation parties, student gatherings
- **Duke University (Durham)**: Campus events, tailgates at Wallace Wade Stadium, fraternity/sorority events, faculty catering

We cater events of all sizes — from a small club meeting to a 200+ person tailgate. The Fiesta Feast package is our most popular for college events.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Where is Mike Nice Empanadas located?
A: Based in Knightdale, NC. The food truck travels throughout the Raleigh-Durham-Chapel Hill Triangle area weekly. Follow @mikeniceempanadas on Instagram for daily locations.

Q: Do you cater events?
A: Yes. We cater weddings, corporate events, private parties, festivals, college events, and more. Booking required 2-3 days in advance. Call (984) 272-2728.

Q: Can I order frozen empanadas?
A: Yes. Frozen packs are available for pickup in Knightdale or at the truck. Call or text to order.

Q: Are you available for events near NC State, UNC, or Duke?
A: Absolutely. We regularly serve the NC State, UNC Chapel Hill, and Duke University communities. Perfect for tailgates, campus events, graduation parties, and student organization catering.

Q: Do you have vegetarian or vegan options?
A: Yes. The Cheese Empanada is vegetarian, and the Vegan Chorizo Empanada is fully plant-based.

Q: What is your most popular empanada?
A: The Birria Empanada — slow-cooked beef birria with rich Mexican spices and cheese — is a fan favorite.

Q: How do I find the truck this week?
A: Follow @mikeniceempanadas on Instagram or check mikeniceempanadas.com for the weekly schedule.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: Raleigh, Durham, Chapel Hill, Knightdale, Cary, Clayton, Apex, Holly Springs, Garner, Wake Forest, Morrisville, and the entire Research Triangle area of North Carolina.
